title: stipellula nitens
intro: Stipellula nitens is a plant species that belongs to the family Compositae, also known as dandelion or sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Stipellula nitens include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Stipellula nitens include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
